title: Be able to delete items from Calendar view
excerpt:
Some teams are using the Calendar view as their default one. In this case, the option to delete item from the calendar view is essential. 
Adding it will make our job easier and faster - since we won’t needed to go every…

posts.author: Roni_Aviram (Roni)
posts.cookedHtml:
Some teams are using the Calendar view as their default one. In this case, the option to delete item from the calendar view is essential.
Adding it will make our job easier and faster - since we won’t needed to go every time to the table view and delete items, or to change the name of the item in calendar view to “delete” and then filter all the “delete” items in the table view.

posts.author: alex.dhia (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml: This is actually weird, you can move things and create things, edit as well. But in order to delete an item from the calendar i have to go to table view and search through over 200 tasks to find the task i need to delete

posts.author: keenan (keenan)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, this is a must have for the calendar view IMO

posts.author: sdimbert (Seth)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree that this would be a great feature

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Roni_Aviram @alex.dhia @keenan, We built a calendar app called MasterPlan Calendar for monday that lets you delete items directly from the calendar view. It also comes with a bunch of extra features beyond the native calendar or other solutions, which has been really helpful for teams like yours. Might be worth checking out: https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000472/masterplan-calendar
